name: meridian-paper-wiki
description: Markdown-first Paper Wiki and research-coding copilot for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use and update a Markdown-first research paper wiki.
interface.longDescription: Meridian provides Prompt/Skill and MCP entries for paper ingestion, retrieval, synthesis, user insights, and wiki-aware research development.
defaultPrompt: Ingest this paper into my Paper Wiki.
Use my Paper Wiki to answer this research question.
Use Lab to plan the next experiment.
